full_text:
Fan Qi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Qi. Center Army Center General during Zhuge Liang’s first Northern Campaign. Fan Qi may not have existed in history. Fan Qi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
